mentions.note: Just transferred to NYSE (largest in 234 years). Targeting $80B revenue by 2030, on track. Investing $50B in U.S. manufacturing and R&D. Oncology booming (Tagriso combos, new breast/liver cancer treatments). GLP-1 weight management pipeline competitive with Eli Lilly—Phase 3 candidate, monthly injectables, muscle-loss mitigation. AI boosting drug discovery productivity and trial success prediction. CEO confident on ambitious targets.
